description: Returns a political party object by its ID.

partyId.description: Unique identifier of the political party.

output.description: Political party object with identity, country, and membership data.

fields.name: string — party name
fields.country: string — countryId the party belongs to
fields.ethicsBonus: number — ethics bonus provided by the party
fields.members: object — member count and related membership info

notes: Authentication may expose additional internal fields.
